title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions:
Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
